codes.BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE: We could not connect へ server right now. Please try again shortly.

codes.SESSION_STORAGE_FAILED: We could not 保存 your sign-in session. Please try again.

codes.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid メール または パスワード. Please check your details と try again.

codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. サインイン again へ 続行.

codes.ALREADY_VERIFIED: アカウント is already verified

about.title: 概要
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype 用 reference と training. なし:t 用 clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support と advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, または determine 人工呼吸器 設定.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against 患者, your 施設 workflow, と local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: 必須 before continuing へ clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device と will be 同期済み when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: レビュー safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data と uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible 用 患者 care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in 施設 context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active 施設 と 役割 shown by your session. Keep records within correct 施設 workflow と follow local escalation, レビュー, と approval procedures.

inputs.title: 入力:ing inputs
inputs.body: Use 入院登録 へ 入力: available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). 任意 ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing 任意 data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a 保存 blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations 表示 advisory 人工呼吸器 setting references 付き a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align 付き your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only と verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: モニタリング と alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a 推奨, use モニタリング へ log vitals と labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds と should be assessed according へ local protocol.

offline.title: オフライン behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (入院登録, advisory summaries, モニタリング) works オフライン. Data is saved locally. 任意 AI features require connectivity. When 戻る オンライン, 続行 as 正常.

help.title: ヘルプ & reference
help.searchPlaceholder: 検索: glossary または guides…

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume と oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory へ expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: 一回換気量 (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, と pH, tied へ a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance と verification state 用 a reference range. Only active approved または verified ranges are eligible 用 active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need レビュー before dataset または training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue 用 レビュー decisions, corrections, exclusions, と audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current オフライン, オンライン, または syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden から 正常 clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; 入力: SpO₂ と その他 vitals when available. 用 better matching, 追加 PaO₂, PaCO₂, と pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app オフライン
offline.body: 入院登録, advisory summaries, と モニタリング work オフライン. Data is stored locally. 任意 AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not 必須 用 core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, 保留中, retired, rejected, と unverified ranges are not eligible 用 active decision-support display. レビュー source, version, scope, と verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness ヘルプ is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness と shadow-mode details are visible only へ approved governance roles. なし:rmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs レビュー
needsReview.body: Use レビュー queue へ check submitted data, request correction, 承認 eligible records, または 除外 records 付き an audit 理由.

guides.home: レビュー 施設 context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, と records needing レビュー before opening a 患者 workflow.
guides.admit: Capture 患者 pathway と available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly と レビュー backend-confirmed calculations after 保存.
guides.tracking: Use 追跡 へ scan recent ventilation status と レビュー needs. Read trend flags 付き source data と local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture 用 de-identified candidate records. Human レビュー is 必須 before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use レビュー queue へ 承認, request correction, または 除外 records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards 用 aggregate quality, レビュー, reference, と governance status. Avoid 患者 identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use 設定 用 アカウント, 施設, accessibility, プライバシー, sync, と reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: レビュー FiO₂ と PEEP; consider recruitment; check 用 shunt または V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: レビュー minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation と perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols と clinical judgment.
